meshmapper_note: MeshMapper is referenced for MeshCore coverage checks. It should not be described as a Meshtastic wardriving tool.
status_note: Status is manually maintained. Public live activity data is not automated yet.
location_privacy_note: Exact private node, observer, gateway, repeater, and support system locations are not published.
ownership_note: Site-maintained systems are listed where known. Observed activity should not be treated as ownership or control of all nearby mesh activity.

local_broker.name: Local MQTT Services
local_broker.public_note: Local MQTT services are not offered as a public broker at this time.
